THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EUREKA RESTAURANT GROUP LLC DBA EUREKA RESTAURANT GROUP ADBA EUREKA $58,091.48 PRINCIPAL, $3,900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $8,198.80 INTEREST, $715.77 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $70,906.05, SEE SCANNED DOC
